content.question: Whether targeted support (TEIP-type) can close achievement gaps rather than merely reducing dropout rates remains uncertain because no longitudinal study has tracked student competency trajectories beyond retention reduction.
content.reduction_path: A 5–8 year longitudinal matched-cohort study comparing TEIP-enrolled and non-enrolled students, controlling for baseline socio-economic status and prior achievement, tracking assessed competency gain (not just exam pass rates).
